Title: Academician
Risk_Flag: Age risk: Might be over 65, usually delegates advising to young APs.

Title: CJ Scholar/Distinguished Youth
Risk_Flag: Often busy with administrative duties. Access time is low.

Title: Four Youth Talents
CN_Name: 四青人才(优青/海优/青拔/青长)
Risk_Flag: Highly active, pushing hard for papers, high pressure/PUA risk.

Title: General Full Professor
Risk_Flag: Check recent funding. If no national grant, funding might be dry.

Title: Associate Professor/AP
Risk_Flag: Often hands-on, high chance of co-first authorship, good for students willing to hustle.

Title: Lecturer without grant
CN_Name: 无头衔无大项目的讲师
Risk_Flag: Avoid if possible for PhD. Funding heavily restricted.
